spec.name: The Sewer Room
spec.description: You are standing in a large room with chairs set in the walls. You have the feeling of being watched. To the south there is an entrance to a larger room. The room is lit by five torches, also set in the walls. To the west there is a doorway leading out to the sewers.

south.description: You can see an even larger room than this one, filled with light.

west.description: To the west you can see the sewers.
